name: SYNAPTICS Inc
business: Synaptics designs and delivers AI-enabled edge solutions, including custom silicon and software platforms for edge AI, wireless connectivity, and human interface technologies. It sells to OEMs in the Core IoT, Enterprise and Automotive, and Mobile markets.

exposures.sentence: Synaptics designs and delivers AI-enabled edge solutions that bring AI closer to end users and transform how we engage with intelligent connected devices, whether at home, at work or on the move.
Our Synaptics Astra AI-native and Veros wireless solutions combine embedded compute, connectivity and multimodal sensing to support intuitive, secure and seamless digital experiences.
Our Synaptics Astra family of AI solutions include a scalable portfolio of intelligent edge processors designed to reduce latency, lower bandwidth usage and enhance security.
We are collaborating with Google's research team to build the next-generation platform for Edge AI devices.

In January 2025, we acquired certain assets and obtained non-exclusive licenses relating to Broadcom Inc.'s (Broadcom) Wi-Fi technology. This transaction is intended to accelerate our Edge AI strategy and next-generation products and technology for the IoT markets.

Our Veros family of wireless connectivity solutions include advanced Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE), Zigbee, Thread, Matter, Global Positioning System (GPS), Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS), Ultra-Wideband (UWB) and Ultra Low Energy (ULE) to address broad Internet of Things (IoT) applications.
We introduced the S3930 touch controller, featuring multi-frequency-region parallel sensing and the industry's smallest high-performance footprint.

catalysts.event: Acquired certain assets and non-exclusive licenses from Broadcom for Wi-Fi technology to accelerate Edge AI strategy
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we acquired certain assets and obtained non-exclusive licenses relating to Broadcom Inc.'s (Broadcom) Wi-Fi technology.
